violations.text: Mini fridge located in the front area was not in good repair (ambient temperature was observed at 45 degrees F). Unit can not be used for TCS items until unit can hold an ambient temperature of 41 degrees of below. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed in 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Various TCS items were observed held between 51-58 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed cheese in freezer and all other product was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Refrigeration units were observed in poor repair. Ambient temperatures were observed between 45 - 64 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer chest have an accumulation of ice/frost. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
The receptacles in the toilet rooms are lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
Ceiling tiles at front counter and back area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2023
The lightbulbs under kitchen hood were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
Paint near ceiling at front counter was observed chipping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2023
